title: rosa × complicata f. pennina
intro: Rosa × complicata f. pennina, also known as the hybrid tea rose, is a cross between Rosa × centifolia and Rosa gallica, resulting in a fragrant and beautiful ornamental plant. The medicinal properties of Rosa × complicata f. pennina are derived from its fragrant flowers, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and calm the body. The herbal preparations of Rosa × complicata f. pennina include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be made from the dried flowers or petals, and used to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
